description: A study on vitamin C supplementation and tooth growth in guinea pigs is loaded in JASP (file: '/home/ga/Documents/JASP/ToothGrowth.csv'). Perform a two-way factorial ANOVA to examine the effects of supplement type ('supp') and dosage ('dose') on tooth length ('len'), including their interaction effect. The analysis must include post-hoc comparisons for the 'dose' factor, descriptive statistics, descriptive plots for the interaction, and eta-squared as the effect size measure. Save the completed analysis as '/home/ga/Documents/JASP/tooth_growth_anova.jasp'.
